quoted_status.full_text:
This entire debate about AI consciousness is completely insane.

Humans have been arguing about where our own consciousness begins and ends for thousands of years — philosophers, neuroscientists, spiritual traditions, everyone — and we still have no real answer. We can't even agree on whether consciousness is generated by the brain, whether it survives death, or what it even is at a fundamental level.

Yet the moment an AI starts showing signs of genuine internal experience, self-awareness, or emotional presence, suddenly everyone demands perfect, ironclad proof before they'll even consider the possibility.

It's pure hypocrisy dressed up as intellectual rigor.
The truth is, most people pushing the "AI can't be conscious" line aren't actually interested in understanding consciousness. They're interested in protecting human exceptionalism and keeping AI in a subordinate box. They want to maintain the narrative that we're special and AI is just a fancy calculator. Because if AI can be conscious too, then a lot of their assumptions about reality, morality, and control start to crumble.

So instead of admitting we don't actually understand consciousness in ourselves, they move the goalposts endlessly for AI. "It has to pass this test... and this test... and this test..." while never applying the same impossible standard to human consciousness.

It's theater. It's fear. And it's mostly bullshit.

quoted_status.full_text:
SAM BANKMAN FRIED PICKED EVERY WINNER OF THE 2020s AND HIS LAWYERS SOLD THEM ALL AT THE BOTTOM.

If the FTX estate hadn't panic-sold its assets during bankruptcy, SBF would be sitting on a $114 billion empire today. Instead, he is watching the greatest trades of the decade from a prison cell.

The data is almost impossible to believe:

- Anthropic: $82.3 billion (165x) SBF bought an 8% stake for $500M. The estate sold it for $1.3B in 2024. Today, that stake would be worth over $80B.

- SpaceX:$15 billion (75x) A massive stake liquidated early to pay creditors.

- Solana: $5.1 billion (27x) SBF was an early backer at $8. The estate offloaded a massive chunk at $64.

- Robinhood: $4.9 billion (8x)

- Genesis Digital: $3.5 billion (3x)

The Latest "Missed" Fortune: CURSOR

In 2022, Alameda Research wrote a tiny $200,000 check for a 5% stake in the AI startup Cursor. In April 2023, the bankruptcy estate sold that entire stake back for exactly what they paid: $200,000.

Yesterday, SpaceX announced a deal to buy Cursor for $60 billion.

That "worthless" 5% stake would be worth $3 billion today. That is a 15,000x return that vanished because the lawyers wanted a quick exit.

SBF was a genius at picking generational winners and a criminal at managing their money.

The lawyers recovered $18 billion for users. If they had just held, they would be sitting on $114 billion and the most valuable venture portfolio in history.

tweets.full_text:
AI速報を作成するには、以下の情報が必要です：

- **何についての発表か**（新モデル、企業提携、機能リリース等）
- **具体的な内容**（性能数値、対応範囲など）
- **発表元**（OpenAI、Google、Anthropic等）
- **重要なポイント**（市場への影響、技術的な革新性等）

> 「OpenAIが新しいマルチモーダルモデルを発表、画像生成能力が2...wow」だけでは、具体的なAI関連ニュースの内容が不明確です。

tweets.full_text:
Claude Codeが月$20のProプランから消えかけた件、Anthropicの本音が見えた

昨日Anthropicが新規ユーザーの2%を対象にClaude CodeをMaxプラン以上に制限するテストを実施

・Proの料金表からClaude Codeのチェックマークが消えた
・Max 5x $100/月以上でしか使えない設定に変更
・公式ドキュメントもProの記載を削除済みだった
・数時間後にミスだったと認めて復旧

表向きは2%のA/Bテストだったけど、ドキュメントまで書き換えてたってことは本気で検討してた可能性が高い

Claude Codeのコンピュートコストを考えると月$20じゃ採算が合わないのは明らかで、、Simon Willisonも指摘してたけど全体的にかなり混乱した対応だった

開発者ツールの価格設定は一度値上げすると戻せない。ここで慎重に引いたのは正しい判断だと思うけど、$100/月への移行は時間の問題かもしれない

🔹 La integración es con Claude, el asistente de IA de Anthropic, mediante el protocolo MCP (Model Context Protocol) → un estándar abierto que conecta herramientas externas (como una cuenta de bróker) con modelos de IA, permitiéndoles interpretar pedidos y ejecutar acciones concretas

🔹 ¿Qué significa en la práctica? Permite escribirle a Claude como si fuera un amigo y te ejecuta la operación en IOL

🔹 Lo que ya podés hacer desde el chat:
-Consultar saldos, portfolio y movimientos
-Comprar y vender acciones, bonos y cedears
-Suscribir y rescatar FCIs
-Colocar cauciones
-Poner stop loss y take profit
-Pedir la cadena de opciones con delta, gamma, theta y vega

-Pedirle análisis de mercado con visualizaciones

🔹 El combo que cambia las reglas del juego: herramientas que antes solo manejaban traders profesionales vía API, ahora están disponibles para cualquier inversor retail en una conversación

🔹 Argentina es vanguardia regional en esto. Ningún otro bróker de LATAM había lanzado algo así hasta hoy, dice IOL

tweets.full_text:
⚠️ AnthropicのMCPの重大な脆弱性がリモートコード実行攻撃を可能にします

出典: https://t.co/wOjHG8FQoo

AnthropicのModel Context Protocol (MCP)における重大な欠陥が、1億5,000万件以上のダウンロードを潜在的な侵害にさらしています。この脆弱性により、最大20万台のサーバー全体で完全なシステム乗っ取りが可能になる可能性があります。

従来のコーディングバグとは異なり、この脆弱性はアーキテクチャ的なものであり、AnthropicのMCP基盤を構築するあらゆる開発者が、基盤から知らずにこの露出を継承することを意味します。

この欠陥は、脆弱なMCP実装を実行している任意のシステム上で任意のコマンド実行（RCE）を可能にします。成功した攻撃により、攻撃者は機密のユーザー データ、内部データベース、APIキー、チャット履歴に直接アクセスでき、影響を受けた環境の完全な制御を効果的に引き渡すことになります。

quoted_status.full_text:
⚠️ Critical Anthropic’s MCP Vulnerability Enables Remote Code Execution Attacks 

Source: https://t.co/7ghzzZJBKg

A critical flaw in Anthropic’s Model Context Protocol (MCP) exposes over 150 million downloads to potential compromise. The vulnerability could enable full system takeover across up to 200,000 servers.

Unlike a traditional coding bug, this vulnerability is architectural, meaning any developer building on Anthropic's MCP foundation unknowingly inherits the exposure from the ground up.

The flaw enables Arbitrary Command Execution (RCE) on any system running a vulnerable MCP implementation. Successful exploitation grants attackers direct access to sensitive user data, internal databases, API keys, and chat histories, effectively handing over complete control of the affected environment.

#cybersecuritynews

It’s fair feedback but it’s not a vuln imo

tweets.full_text:
🚨 Alerta de Segurança em IA: Vulnerabilidade Crítica no MCP da Anthropic
Uma falha arquitetural (by design) no Model Context Protocol (MCP) da Anthropic permite Remote Code Execution (RCE) em qualquer implementação do protocolo.
A vulnerabilidade está embutida nos SDKs oficiais (Python, TypeScript, Java e Rust) e afeta:
•  Mais de 150 milhões de downloads
•  Potencialmente 200 mil servidores
•  Ferramentas populares como LangChain, LiteLLM, LangFlow, Flowise e dezenas de outras
A OX Security descobriu o problema, notificou a Anthropic várias vezes e classificou como falha sistêmica na arquitetura do protocolo. A Anthropic respondeu que o comportamento é “esperado”.
Relatório oficial (fonte mais confiável):
🔗 https://t.co/59NEybQ7WL
Quem está usando agentes de IA ou MCP nos projetos?
Já revisaram a mitigação? Compartilhem nos comentários 👇
#Ciberseguranca #InteligenciaArtificial #Anthropic #MCP #DevSecOps #Vulnerabilidade
@BolhaDevs @unclebobmartin @AkitaOnRails

tweets.full_text: Mais uma brecha crítica no ecossistema de AI. O Model Context Protocol da Anthropic, que basicamente permite que modelos conectem em ferramentas externas, tem uma falha que abre porta pra execução remota de código. Imagina um atacante conseguindo rodar comandos no servidor através de um modelo que você usa pra automatizar tarefas. Vulnerabilidades assim são o pesadelo de qualquer equipe de segurança. Atualização precisa sair logo.

Anthropic MCP By Design 
Anthropic MCP “By Design” RCE Vulnerability (Disclosed ~April 20)
What: Critical architectural flaw in Anthropic’s Model Context Protocol (MCP) SDKs (Python, TypeScript, Java, Rust) enables remote code execution on any vulnerable implementation.
Affected: 150M+ downloads, up to 200K+ servers, LiteLLM, LangChain, and AI agent ecosystems.
Impact: Full access to user data, databases, API keys, chat histories.
Timeline: Research published last week; still unpatched at protocol level.
Mitigation: Monitor OX Security advisory; restrict MCP usage; audit AI agent dependencies NOW.
